case_title: ANNGIE LAU NAVARRO VS. RICARDO ENRIQUE SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY NAVARRO, ANNGIE LAU SANDOVAL, RICARDO ENRIQUE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, ANNGIE LAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, RICARDO ENRIQUE $3,133.20 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,183.20, DEFENDANT FAILED TO HAVE DOG ON LEASH AND DOG DARTED OUT ON TO THE STREET. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, RICARDO ENRIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ANNGIE LAU NAVARRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICARDO ENRIQUE SANDOVAL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,283.99 FILED BY NAVARRO, ANNGIE LAU AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, RICARDO ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
